OSHINOKO_CARD_RUBY_STRIKE.title: Strike
OSHINOKO_CARD_IDOL_ADMIRATION.title: Idol Yearning
OSHINOKO_CARD_PASSION_STRIKE.title: Passionate Blow
OSHINOKO_CARD_RADIANT_BURST.title: Radiant Burst
OSHINOKO_CARD_RADIANT_BURST.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies twice. Gain 1 [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_TEASE.title: Tease
OSHINOKO_CARD_SIDE_GLANCE.title: Side Glance
OSHINOKO_CARD_INFECTIOUS_PASSION.title: Infectious Passion
OSHINOKO_CARD_INFECTIOUS_PASSION.descrip: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. If this card deals more than 9 damage, gain 1 [gold]Turn Shine[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_HEART_FLUTTER_ATTACK.title: Heartflutter Attack
OSHINOKO_CARD_HEART_FLUTTER_ATTACK.descr: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to a single enemy. If it deals more than {Threshold:diff()} damage, refund {RefundEnergy:energyIcons()}.
OSHINOKO_CARD_FLASH_BEAT.title: Flash Beat
OSHINOKO_CARD_FLASH_BEAT.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. If you used [gold]Shine[/gold] this turn, deal that damage again.
OSHINOKO_CARD_SCARLET_ENCORE.title: Scarlet Encore
OSHINOKO_CARD_SCARLET_ENCORE.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies. If you drew cards this turn, deal it twice instead.
OSHINOKO_CARD_REHEARSAL.title: Dress Rehearsal
OSHINOKO_CARD_REHEARSAL.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Search your draw pile for a Shine card and put it into your hand.
OSHINOKO_CARD_SPINNING_STEP.title: Spinning Step
OSHINOKO_CARD_SPINNING_STEP.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to random enemies 3 times. If you played 2 Shine cards this turn, deal it 4 times instead.
OSHINOKO_CARD_DOUBT.title: Doubt
OSHINOKO_CARD_DOUBT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a single enemy. If the damage dealt is greater than {Threshold:diff()}, gain {Revenge:diff()} [gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_SPIRIT_SURGE.title: Spirit Surge
OSHINOKO_CARD_SPIRIT_SURGE.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to an enemy. Next turn, gain 3 [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_IDOL_SONG.title: Idol Song
OSHINOKO_CARD_IDOL_SONG.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Gain 2 [gold]Turn Shine[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_VENGEANCE_BELL.title: Vengeance Bell
OSHINOKO_CARD_VENGEANCE_BELL.description: Lose {SelfDamage:diff()} HP. All enemies lose 10 HP, and lose another 10 HP at the start of your next turn. Gain {Revenge:diff()} [gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_PAIN.title: Pain
OSHINOKO_CARD_RECKLESS_CHARGE.title: Reckless Charge
OSHINOKO_CARD_RECKLESS_CHARGE.descriptio: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. Choose a card in your hand to exhaust, then gain [gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold] equal to that card's cost.
OSHINOKO_CARD_STAGE_CRASH.title: Stage Crash
OSHINOKO_CARD_STAGE_CRASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Lose 2 HP. Gain 2 [gold]Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_SCATTERED_LIGHT.title: Scattered Light
OSHINOKO_CARD_SCATTERED_LIGHT.descriptio: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Draw 3 cards, then play 1 Shine card from among them for free.
OSHINOKO_CARD_FINAL_POSE.title: Final Pose
OSHINOKO_CARD_FINAL_POSE.description: Can only be played if your [gold]Shine[/gold] is greater than 3. Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Apply 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_STARFALL_OATH.title: Starfall Oath
OSHINOKO_CARD_STARFALL_OATH.description: It can only be played if [gold]Shine[/gold] greater than 6. Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Gain 2 energy points next turn.
OSHINOKO_CARD_IDOL_CONFIDENCE.title: Idol Confidence
OSHINOKO_CARD_RUBY_SHINE.title: Ruby Shine
OSHINOKO_CARD_RUBY_SHINE.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage{ShinePlays:diff()} times. Each time [gold]Shine[/gold] is used in this battle, the number of attacks will be +1.
OSHINOKO_CARD_SPIKES_OF_LIES.title: Spikes Of Lies
OSHINOKO_CARD_SPIKES_OF_LIES.description: Loses 2 health, removes all enemy artifacts, and adds {Vulnerable:diff()} layers of [gold]vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]weak[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_MIRROR_STAGE.title: Mirror Stage
OSHINOKO_CARD_MIRROR_STAGE.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], and reflect all damage caused by [gold]block[/gold] this turn.
OSHINOKO_CARD_PLACE_OF_LIGHT.title: Where The Light Is
OSHINOKO_CARD_PLACE_OF_LIGHT.description: For every 1 point of [gold]Shine[/gold], the card's cost is reduced by 1. Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to the enemy. If the cost becomes 0, gain 1 energy point.
OSHINOKO_CARD_CODE_B.title: Password B
OSHINOKO_CARD_CODE_B.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies 3 times, and gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points of defense 3 times.
OSHINOKO_CARD_RUBY_DEFEND.title: Defend
OSHINOKO_CARD_PASSION_DEFENSE.title: Passionate Defense
OSHINOKO_CARD_PASSION_DEFENSE.descriptio: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} defense points and 2 [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold] points.
OSHINOKO_CARD_MIYA_A_DREAM.title: Meimi A Dream
OSHINOKO_CARD_BACKSTAGE_SUPPORT.title: Backstage Support
OSHINOKO_CARD_BACKSTAGE_SUPPORT.descript: Get {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], and get 1 point[gold] in the next turn to Shine[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_SMALL_TRICK.title: Small Trick
OSHINOKO_CARD_SMALL_TRICK.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose a card from the discard pile and place it on top of the draw pile.
OSHINOKO_CARD_AQUA_CALL.title: Brother's Support
OSHINOKO_CARD_CHEER_UP.title: Cheer Up
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIRST_APPEARANCE.title: Debut
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIRST_APPEARANCE.descripti: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and add 1 Stunned to your draw pile.
OSHINOKO_CARD_BREATH_CONTROL.title: Breath Control
OSHINOKO_CARD_BREATH_CONTROL.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. The next shining card in your hand costs -1.
OSHINOKO_CARD_DECEIVE.title: Cheat
OSHINOKO_CARD_DECEIVE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If you have lost life this turn, gain 1 point of [gold] Temporary Revenge [/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_ONLINE_BACKLASH.title: Online Backlash
OSHINOKO_CARD_ONLINE_BACKLASH.descriptio: Lose 1 life point and gain {Revenge:diff()} [gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold]. Draw 1 card.
OSHINOKO_CARD_TRUE_WORDS.title: True Words
OSHINOKO_CARD_TRUE_WORDS.description: Removes all defenses from an enemy. If its defense is greater than 15, gain 1 point [gold]Shine[/gold] and draw 1 card.
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIRM_BELIEF.title: Firm Belief
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIRM_BELIEF.description: Convert [gold] temporary Shine [/gold] to [gold] turn Shine [/gold], and convert [gold] turn Shine [/gold] to [gold] permanent Shine[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_ACT_CUTE.title: Acting Cute
OSHINOKO_CARD_ACT_CUTE.description: In the next turn, you will get no entity and cannot play cards. After the next turn, restore {Heal:diff()} HP.
OSHINOKO_CARD_NO_WAY_BACK.title: No Way Back
OSHINOKO_CARD_NO_WAY_BACK.description: Randomly exhaust 1 card in your hand to gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_IDOL_DISGUISE.title: Idol Disguise
OSHINOKO_CARD_IDOL_DISGUISE.description: For each enemy on the field, gain additional {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_DAILY_ACCUMULATION.title: Daily Accumulation
OSHINOKO_CARD_DAILY_ACCUMULATION.descrip: Obtain [gold]Block[/gold] from the total of [gold]Shine[/gold] and [gold]Revenge[/gold] obtained in this game.
OSHINOKO_CARD_IDOL_PASSION.title: Idol Passion
OSHINOKO_CARD_IDOL_PASSION.description: Gain {Shine:diff()} points for [gold] turns and Shine [/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_SWITCH_TO_VENGEANCE.title: Broken Stage
OSHINOKO_CARD_SWITCH_TO_VENGEANCE.descri: Lose 2 HP and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If you have lost life this turn, draw 3 cards.
OSHINOKO_CARD_SWITCH_TO_SHINE.title: Heartfelt Echo
OSHINOKO_CARD_COLD_SMILE.title: Cold Smile
OSHINOKO_CARD_COLD_SMILE.description: Lose 1 life point, gain {Block:diff()} point [gold]Block[/gold], gain 1 [gold] temporary Revenge [/gold] point.
OSHINOKO_CARD_DOCTOR_BONES.title: Doctor Bones
OSHINOKO_CARD_DOCTOR_BONES.description: Convert all of your [gold]Shine[/gold] into [gold]Revenge[/gold]. Gain the same amount of energy and lose 2 HP.
OSHINOKO_CARD_SIBLINGS_REUNITED.title: Siblings Reunited
OSHINOKO_CARD_SIBLINGS_REUNITED.descript: Convert all of your [gold]Revenge[/gold] into [gold]Shine[/gold]. Draw an equal number of cards and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_NEVER_GIVE_UP.title: Never Give Up
OSHINOKO_CARD_NEVER_GIVE_UP.description: Gain 2 points for [gold]Shine[/gold] and gain 15 [gold] for Block [/gold]. If you have used [gold]Shine[/gold] this turn, gain 1 energy point.
OSHINOKO_CARD_MOTHERS_LIE.title: Mother's Lies
OSHINOKO_CARD_MOTHERS_LIE.description: Gain 3 points in [gold] turn to take Revenge [/gold]. When you lose life every time this turn, all enemies will lose 5 HP.
OSHINOKO_CARD_CAREFUL_PLAN.title: Careful Plan
OSHINOKO_CARD_CAREFUL_PLAN.description: Choose 1 card from 5 cards and place it on the top of the draw pile. In the next turn, you will get an additional 2 points of energy and [gold]Turn Shine[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_BACKSTAGE_LIVE.title: Behind The Scenes
OSHINOKO_CARD_HONEST_STAGE.title: Sincere Stage
OSHINOKO_CARD_HONEST_STAGE.description: Gain 2 points of [gold]Shine[/gold]. If the current [gold]Shine[/gold] greater than 4, gain 2 points of energy.
OSHINOKO_CARD_SHADOW_ECHO.title: Shadow Echo
OSHINOKO_CARD_SHADOW_ECHO.description: Gain 2 points of [gold]Revenge[/gold]. If the current [gold]Revenge[/gold] is greater than 3, draw 2 cards.
OSHINOKO_CARD_DISDAIN.title: Contempt
OSHINOKO_CARD_SPOTLIGHT_SHARE.title: Spotlight Exclusive
OSHINOKO_CARD_SPOTLIGHT_SHARE.descriptio: All teammates gain 1 energy point and draw 1 card.
OSHINOKO_CARD_ACT_SPOILED.title: Behave In A Spoiled Manner
OSHINOKO_CARD_ACT_SPOILED.description: All teammates are restored to {Heal:diff()} HP, and you are restored to {Heal:diff()} HP.
OSHINOKO_CARD_BURNED_LETTER.title: Burnt Letter
OSHINOKO_CARD_BURNED_LETTER.description: Remove all negative effects from teammates. Next round you and all teammates gain {Energy:diff()} energy points.
OSHINOKO_CARD_REBIRTH.title: Rebirth
OSHINOKO_CARD_REBIRTH.description: Wash away all buffs from yourself and restore 10 HP.
OSHINOKO_CARD_CHASING_LIGHT.title: Chasing The Light
OSHINOKO_CARD_CHASING_LIGHT.description: For every {Threshold:diff()} point [gold]Shine[/gold] used, 1 energy point is obtained.
OSHINOKO_CARD_FLEEING_LIGHT.title: Fleeing From Light
OSHINOKO_CARD_FLEEING_LIGHT.description: For every {Threshold:diff()} point[gold]Revenge[/gold] used, draw 1 card.
OSHINOKO_CARD_LAST_MINUTE_STUDY.title: Final Review
OSHINOKO_CARD_LAST_MINUTE_STUDY.descript: When playing a skill card, gain 1 point [gold] temporary Shine [/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_STAY_INDOORS.title: Stay Behind Closed Doors
OSHINOKO_CARD_STAY_INDOORS.description: At the end of the round, if you lost life this turn, you will gain 2 [gold] Temporary Revenge [/gold] and 5 [gold] Block [/gold] points in the next turn.
OSHINOKO_CARD_RUMOR_NETWORK.title: Rumor Network
OSHINOKO_CARD_RUMOR_NETWORK.description: When giving [gold] Weak[/gold] or [gold] Vulnerable[/gold] for the first time each round, draw {Threshold:diff()} cards.
OSHINOKO_CARD_STAGE_ARMOR.title: Stage Shell
OSHINOKO_CARD_STAGE_ARMOR.description: For every life point lost, gain {BlockPerHp:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_DIE_ALONE.title: Die Alone
OSHINOKO_CARD_DIE_ALONE.description: Lose 2 HP and gain 3 points of [gold]Revenge[/gold]. When losing life for the first time each round, gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold] points.
OSHINOKO_CARD_RUBY_LEGACY.title: Ruby's Legacy
OSHINOKO_CARD_RUBY_LEGACY.description: When you get [gold]Shine[/gold], get 3 points of [gold] block[/gold]. When gaining [gold]Revenge[/gold], lose 1 life and gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_SHELL_FORGED_BY_LIES.title: A Shell Made Of Lies
OSHINOKO_CARD_SHELL_FORGED_BY_LIES.descr: At the end of the round, cause [gold]Revenge[/gold]*6 damage to all enemies. If you have lost life this turn, damage +8.
OSHINOKO_CARD_LIGHT_FROM_PASSION.title: The Light Of Passion
OSHINOKO_CARD_LIGHT_FROM_PASSION.descrip: At the end of the turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Shine[/gold]*6.
OSHINOKO_CARD_RETREAT_BACKSTAGE.title: Escape Behind The Scenes
OSHINOKO_CARD_RETREAT_BACKSTAGE.descript: When you get [gold]Revenge[/gold] for the first time each round, you get 2 points of energy and 10 points of [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_TAKE_THE_STAGE.title: Get On Stage
OSHINOKO_CARD_TAKE_THE_STAGE.description: When you get [gold]Shine[/gold] for the first time each round, draw 2 cards and gain 6 points of [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_IDOL_RADIANCE.title: Idol Light
OSHINOKO_CARD_IDOL_RADIANCE.description: Gain 2 points of [gold]Shine[/gold]. When you play a Shine card for the first time in each round, you will get 2 point of [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_REVEAL_TRUTH.title: Reveal The Truth
OSHINOKO_CARD_REVEAL_TRUTH.description: Gain 2 points of [gold]Revenge[/gold]. At the beginning of the round, if your health is less than half, gain 1 point of [gold]Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_REHEARSAL.selectionScreenP: Choose 1 shining card and add it to your hand.
OSHINOKO_CARD_SMALL_TRICK.selectionScree: Choose 1 skill card and place it on top of the draw pile.
OSHINOKO_CARD_CAREFUL_PLAN.selectionScre: Choose 1 card and place it on top of the draw pile.
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIND_TRUTH.selectionScreen: Select cards from the exhaust pile and add them to your hand.
OSHINOKO_CARD_STUNNED.title: Stunned
OSHINOKO_CARD_CHANNEL_SUBSCRIBE.title: Channel Subscription
OSHINOKO_CARD_CHANNEL_SUBSCRIBE.descript: Obtain {Artifact:diff()} level artifacts, and upgrade a card randomly after the battle.
OSHINOKO_CARD_LOVE_HARD_TO_CONVEY.title: Indescribable Love
OSHINOKO_CARD_LOVE_HARD_TO_CONVEY.descri: Draw cards equal to the number of Shines. Draw {CalculatedCards:diff()} cards.
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIND_TRUTH.title: Find the Truth
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIND_TRUTH.description: You can play it when the current [gold] shining [/gold] is greater than 3. Select {Cards:diff()} cards from the exhaust pile and add them to your hand.
OSHINOKO_CARD_MOTHER.title: Mother...
OSHINOKO_CARD_MOTHER.description: Get 2 points [gold] turn to Shine [/gold], 2 energy points, draw 2 cards
OSHINOKO_CARD_REACH_YOU_PACE.title: Catch Up With You
OSHINOKO_CARD_REACH_YOU_PACE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, and gains [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the damage caused.
OSHINOKO_CARD_DETERRENCE.title: Deterrence
OSHINOKO_CARD_DETERRENCE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies, giving {Vulnerable:diff()} layers of [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_HOPE.title: Hope
OSHINOKO_CARD_UNDER_CURTAIN.title: Under The Curtain
OSHINOKO_CARD_AQUA_STRIKE.title: Strike
OSHINOKO_CARD_AQUA_DEFEND.title: Defend
OSHINOKO_CARD_HANDSCROLL_PAINTING.title: Handscroll Painting
OSHINOKO_CARD_HANDSCROLL_PAINTING.descri:
After winning the battle, 1 card can be permanently removed from the deck. 
[gold]Plan 1[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_UNREACHABLE.title: Out Of Reach
OSHINOKO_CARD_UNREACHABLE.description: For every 7 cards drawn, an additional card is drawn.
OSHINOKO_CARD_ENCORE.title: Encore
OSHINOKO_CARD_ENCORE.description: Each time you obtain a blood-soaked petal, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold] points.
OSHINOKO_CARD_NIGHTMARE.title: Nightmare
OSHINOKO_CARD_NIGHTMARE.description: Whenever a card is exhausted, gain 2 points [gold] Temporary Revenge [/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_BEAUTIFUL_DREAM.title: Beautiful Dream
OSHINOKO_CARD_BEAUTIFUL_DREAM.descriptio: Each time a card is generated during battle, gain 2 points of [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_TWO_CHILDS.title: Two Kids?
OSHINOKO_CARD_TWO_CHILDS.description: Gain 2 points of [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold] and 2 points of [gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold] each round.
OSHINOKO_CARD_CAP_UNDER_MOON.title: Hat Under The Moon
OSHINOKO_CARD_CAP_UNDER_MOON.description: Get {Shine:diff()} points [gold]Shine[/gold], get {TurnShine:diff()} points [gold] turn Shine [/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_AI_DIED.title: Ai
OSHINOKO_CARD_PROFILE.title: Profile
OSHINOKO_CARD_PROFILE.description: Each time a [gold]Plan [/gold] card is played, draw 1 card.
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIRE_EXECUTION.title: Burning At The Stake
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIRE_EXECUTION.description: Each time you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, grant 2 stack of [gold]Rumor[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_METAMORPHOSIS.title: Metamorphosis
OSHINOKO_CARD_METAMORPHOSIS.description: You are no longer affected by [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Frail[/gold], or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_THEREBY_SHINING.title: Thus Shine
OSHINOKO_CARD_THEREBY_SHINING.descriptio: Each time a [gold] Void[/gold] card is played, gain 1 energy point.
OSHINOKO_CARD_BLACK_STAR.title: Black Star
OSHINOKO_CARD_BLACK_STAR.description: Each time you get [gold]Plan [/gold], you will get 1 additional layer.
OSHINOKO_CARD_STAGE_CENTER.title: Center Stage
OSHINOKO_CARD_BLOOD_FLOWER.title: Blood Soaked Petals
OSHINOKO_CARD_BLOOD_IN_STAGE.title: Blood Stained Stage
OSHINOKO_CARD_DANCING.title: Dance
OSHINOKO_CARD_TROUBLE.title: Trouble
OSHINOKO_CARD_TROUBLE.description: Get {Cards:diff()} blood-soaked petals at the beginning of the next turn.
OSHINOKO_CARD_PLOT_PLAN.title: Plan
OSHINOKO_CARD_SHUFFLING_STEP.title: First Step
OSHINOKO_CARD_PERSUADE.title: Persuade
OSHINOKO_CARD_PERSUADE.description: For each enemy, a blood-soaked petal is generated.
OSHINOKO_CARD_SUPPORT.title: Support
OSHINOKO_CARD_SUPPORT.description: Exhaust the void cards in your hand.
OSHINOKO_CARD_LIGHT_STICK.title: Light Stick
OSHINOKO_CARD_GIVE_HOPE.title: Give Hope
OSHINOKO_CARD_GIVE_HOPE.description: Choose two cards in your hand and reduce the cost by 1 point this turn.
OSHINOKO_CARD_STAND.title: Stand Still
OSHINOKO_CARD_STAND.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Choose a card in your hand to retain.
OSHINOKO_CARD_PASSION.title: Enthusiasm
OSHINOKO_CARD_COLD_FACE.title: Cold Face
OSHINOKO_CARD_COLD_FACE.description: Gives all enemies {Vulnerable:diff()} layers of [gold] vulnerability to [/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_WHISPER.title: Whisper
OSHINOKO_CARD_WHISPER.description: Removes an enemy's Artifact and grants {Weak:diff()} levels of [gold]Weak[/gold].

OSHINOKO_CARD_WATCH.title: Keep Watch
OSHINOKO_CARD_HOLD_ONTO.title: Hold On To

OSHINOKO_CARD_PERFECT_OVER.title: Perfect Ending
OSHINOKO_CARD_HIDE.title: Hide
OSHINOKO_CARD_ARIMA_KANA.title: Kana Arima!
OSHINOKO_CARD_SIDE_PROFILE.title: Profile
OSHINOKO_CARD_DAZZLING_DEFEND.title: Dazzling Block
OSHINOKO_CARD_CRY_IN10_SEC.title: You Can Cry In 10 Seconds
OSHINOKO_CARD_DODGE.title: Dodge
OSHINOKO_CARD_DODGE.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], and gain 1 layer of [gold] to escape[/gold]. 
[gold]Plan 1[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_DOUBT_LIFE.title: Doubt Life
OSHINOKO_CARD_DOUBT_LIFE.description: Gives the enemy {Trap:diff()} layers of [gold] traps [/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_EXPECT.title: Expect
OSHINOKO_CARD_EXPECT.description:
Consumable cards played during this turn will go into the discard pile. 
[gold]Plan 2[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_SHOULD_BE_PROTECTED.title: Things To Protect
OSHINOKO_CARD_SHOULD_BE_PROTECTED.descri: Gives all enemies {ShouldBeProtectedWeak:diff()} level[gold]Weak[/gold], {ShouldBeProtectedVulnerable:diff()} level[gold]vulnerable[/gold], {ShouldBeProtectedDebilitate:diff()} level[gold]destroy[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_BEHIND_SHADOW.title: Shadows Follow
OSHINOKO_CARD_BEHIND_SHADOW.description: Lose 2 HP, gain 2 points of [gold]turn Revenge[/gold], and double the number of negative effect layers on all enemies.
OSHINOKO_CARD_GABRIEL.title: Gabriel
OSHINOKO_CARD_GABRIEL.description: Recover {Heal:diff()} points of blood and gain 1 layer of [gold]Incorporeal[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_BACK_VIEW.title: Back View
OSHINOKO_CARD_BACK_VIEW.description: The next card is returned to the hand when played.
OSHINOKO_CARD_SAME_DESTINATION.title: Different Paths To The Same Destination
OSHINOKO_CARD_SAME_DESTINATION.descripti: The next card played will be played twice.
OSHINOKO_CARD_EMBRACE.title: Embrace
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIRE_BODY.title: Body Forged By Fire
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIRE_BODY.description: Lose 2 HP, wash away all negative effects, and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_SIDE_BY_SIDE.title: Side By Side
OSHINOKO_CARD_SIDE_BY_SIDE.description: Double the number of positive effects you have.
OSHINOKO_CARD_GEMINI.title: Gemini
OSHINOKO_CARD_GEMINI.description: Gain 2 points for [gold]Turn Shine[/gold] and 2 points for [gold]Turn Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_SINKING.title: Sink
OSHINOKO_CARD_DESTINATION.title: End
OSHINOKO_CARD_GIVE_HOPE.selectionScreenP: Choose up to 2 cards in your hand, the cost of this turn is -1.
OSHINOKO_CARD_STAND.selectionScreenPromp: Choose 1 card in your hand and keep it this turn.
OSHINOKO_CARD_DUAL_WIELD.title: Dual Wield
OSHINOKO_CARD_DRAW_SWORD.title: Draw Sword
OSHINOKO_CARD_DRAW_SWORD.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage and obtain a blood-soaked petal.
OSHINOKO_CARD_INTERCEPT.title: Intercept
OSHINOKO_CARD_INTERCEPT.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies and gains {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points of [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_FARAWAY.title: Faraway
OSHINOKO_CARD_FARAWAY.description: Inflict {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies at the beginning of the next turn.
OSHINOKO_CARD_BLOOD_SWORD.title: Blood Stained Sword
OSHINOKO_CARD_BLOOD_SWORD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain 2 points of [gold]Temporary Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_NERVER_RETURN.title: Never Look Back
OSHINOKO_CARD_NERVER_RETURN.description: Consumes the void cards in your hand, causing {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies for each exhausted card.
OSHINOKO_CARD_DESOLATE_BATTLEFIELD.title: The Battlefield Is Deserted
OSHINOKO_CARD_DESOLATE_BATTLEFIELD.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies, and the enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIRE_ATTACK.title: Fire Draws Sword
OSHINOKO_CARD_FIRE_ATTACK.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to the enemy 3 times.
OSHINOKO_CARD_KEEP_SHEATH.title: Keep The Scabbard
OSHINOKO_CARD_KEEP_SHEATH.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage and gain a cost equal to [gold] Plan[/gold] layers.
OSHINOKO_CARD_LOOK_AT.title: Look At
OSHINOKO_CARD_LOOK_AT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, gives {Vulnerable:diff()} layer [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and {Weak:diff()} layer [gold]Weak[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_STARE_AT.title: Stare~
OSHINOKO_CARD_STARE_AT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and grants {Rumor:diff()} layers of [gold]rumor[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_PARRY.title: Parry
OSHINOKO_CARD_PARRY.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage and gains {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points of [gold]Block[/gold]. 
[gold]Plan 1[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_FULL_OF_ENTHUSIASM.title: Overflowing With Enthusiasm
OSHINOKO_CARD_FULL_OF_ENTHUSIASM.descrip:
Removes the enemy's defense, causing {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. 
[gold]Plan 1[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_WEAPON_RACK.title: Weapon Rack
OSHINOKO_CARD_WEAPON_RACK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 2 times, and gain a blood-soaked petal for each unblocked damage caused.
OSHINOKO_CARD_BOND.title: Bond
OSHINOKO_CARD_BOND.description:
Gives all enemies {Rumor:diff()} layers of [gold] Rumor [/gold] and causes {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. 
[gold]Plan 1[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_EVADE.title: Evade
OSHINOKO_CARD_POISED_TO.title: Ready To Go
OSHINOKO_CARD_POISED_TO.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage, choose a card in your hand and give it to Void.
OSHINOKO_CARD_HATRED.title: Hatred
OSHINOKO_CARD_HATRED.description:
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage and doubles the number of stacks of all negative effects the enemy has. 
[gold]Plan 1[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_TOUKEN_RANBU.title: Touken Ranbu
OSHINOKO_CARD_DISPERSE_LIGHT.title: Dissipated Light
OSHINOKO_CARD_DISPERSE_LIGHT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, causing the opponent to lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} points of [gold] strength[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_CLASH.title: Confrontation
OSHINOKO_CARD_CLASH.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage, and if the enemy's intention is to attack, causes {CalculatedBonusDamage:diff()} damage.
OSHINOKO_CARD_ICE_AND_FIRE.title: Ice And Fire
OSHINOKO_CARD_ICE_AND_FIRE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies and gains {CalculatedBlock:diff()} points of [gold]Block[/gold]. 
[gold]Plan 1[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_BITE_TIGHT.title: Bite Tightly
OSHINOKO_CARD_BITE_TIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the enemy and gives {Trap:diff()} layers of [gold]traps[/gold]. 
[gold]Plan 2[/gold].
OSHINOKO_CARD_UNDER_THE_SEA.title: Fall Into The Sea
OSHINOKO_CARD_UNDER_THE_SEA.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and dies in the next turn.
OSHINOKO_CARD_DEUS_EX_MACHINA.title: Deus Ex Machina
OSHINOKO_CARD_POISED_TO.selectionScreenP: Choose 1 card in your hand to gain Void.
